name: Registry Configured RunOnce Task Execution
description: Detects the execution of `runonce.exe` with the `/AlternateShellStartup` flag, indicating a task configured via the registry's RunOnce mechanism. Adversaries may use this to execute code after a system restart for persistence or defense evasion. Investigate any matches to confirm legitimate use.

parameters.name: timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of the process creation event.

parameters.name: event_id
parameters.description: The Sysmon Event ID for Process Creation (1).

parameters.name: process_name
parameters.description: The name of the process that was executed, which should be 'runonce.exe'.

parameters.name: process_path
parameters.description: The full path to the runonce.exe executable.

parameters.name: command_line
parameters.description: The full command line used to execute runonce.exe, including '/AlternateShellStartup'.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account under which runonce.exe was executed.

parameters.name: host
parameters.description: The hostname where the event occurred.
